title: Showcase
description: Real marketing and app screens — a full travel landing page, pricing, a hero, a sign-in — styled entirely from FDS tokens, no utility classes and no copied component CSS.
intro: The Example dashboard proves you can build a working app screen from tokens alone. This gallery widens the claim to the surfaces people judge a design system by first: a complete, pixel-faithful marketing homepage; a pricing table; a landing hero; an auth card. Each screen's stylesheet is scanned at build time, so every colour, space, radius and shadow is a real --fx-* token — none off-system.
proofBlurb: Like the dashboard, each screen's stylesheet is checked against the package registry at build time — the same array of tokens the package exports. An off-system value would surface as a failure on the page rather than drift silently, so the gallery cannot fall out of sync with the system it advertises.

items.title: Travel landing page
items.blurb: A complete tour-booking homepage — hero, search, destinations, deals, packages, reviews, footer — rebuilt pixel-for-pixel from tokens. Recolour the whole site live from three brand inputs.

items.title: Restaurant landing page
items.blurb: A full restaurant homepage — hero, menu, chef, gallery, reservation, reviews, footer — built entirely from tokens. Reskin the whole brand live from three inputs.

items.title: Real estate landing page
items.blurb: A complete property portal — search hero, featured listings, agents, neighbourhoods, CTA, footer — every card and filter drawn from tokens. Recolour the whole brand live.

items.title: SaaS landing page
items.blurb: A modern product homepage — hero, logos, features, workflow, pricing, testimonials, footer — token-built end to end. Change the brand and the whole page re-themes instantly.

items.title: Spa & beauty landing page
items.blurb: A warm spa homepage — hero, services, treatments, team, booking, testimonials, footer — proving FDS handles soft, elegant brands too. Live recolour from three inputs.

items.title: Pricing
items.blurb: Three tiers, one highlighted — the highest-intent marketing surface, built from token fills, borders and radii.

items.title: Landing hero
items.blurb: A hero with headline, sub, two calls to action and a feature row — the page a first-time visitor lands on.

items.title: Sign-in
items.blurb: A centered auth card with real inputs, a focus ring and primary/secondary actions — the app's front door.

pricing.heading: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.sub: Every plan includes the full token system. Upgrade for scale.

landing.title: Ship a consistent brand across every screen
landing.sub: One tiny brand derives a complete, contrast-checked theme. No utility classes to memorise, no component source to keep in sync — just tokens your whole stack can read.

features.title: Derived, not configured
features.text: Pick a brand colour; hover, active and on-colours derive automatically — always AA-safe.

features.title: One dependency
features.text: Zero runtime deps. A token registry, pure functions and CSS variables — nothing to bundle.

features.title: Framework-free
features.text: The output is --fx-* custom properties. Use them from React, Vue, WordPress or plain CSS.
